# ============================================================
# This file is generated from pyproject.toml for compatibility.
# The canonical dependency source is pyproject.toml.
#
# To regenerate:
#   uv export --no-hashes --output-file requirements.txt
#
# To install directly with pip (not recommended):
#   pip install -r requirements.txt
# ============================================================
# Use UV instead:
#   uv sync                   # Install all dependencies
#   uv sync --group dev       # Include dev dependencies
#   uv run build-index        # Run indexer
#   uv run search             # Run search CLI
